[← Back to Home](index.html){.back-button}

# About Me

My journey with the Red Cross Society shaped my commitment to serving others—first as a Social Worker providing psychosocial support, then as an Administration Worker managing teams and operations. Now pursuing my MBA at University Canada West, I combine my data analytics background with hands-on community experience. I believe in using business skills to strengthen organizations that make a difference, which is why I continue volunteering at Burnaby Hospice Society.
